title: _Static_assert guards on TPM2_CTX/WOLFTPM2_DEV size catch layout regressions at compile time
description: wolftpm_rs_shim.c has _Static_assert(sizeof(TPM2_CTX) > sizeof(void*)) and _Static_assert(sizeof(WOLFTPM2_DEV) >= sizeof(TPM2_CTX)). These will catch binary size regressions in wolfTPM structs that the shim accesses internally. A future contributor might remove them as 'unnecessary'. They should be kept and ideally extended with an assert on the exact offset of cmdBuf within TPM2_CTX using offsetof().
